images.copyright: Katahdin Woods and Waters National Monument, Maine (© Cavan Images/Offset/Shutterstock)
images.title: A wilder side of Maine
images.caption: Katahdin Woods and Waters National Monument, Maine
images.desc: If you're looking for Maine at its most untamed, this is it. Katahdin Woods and Waters National Monument stretches across about 87,500 acres of the raw North Woods—where quiet ponds mirror the sky and dense forests seem to swallow sound.

tooltips.walle: This image is not available to download as wallpaper.
